_comment: OPERATOR ACTION REQUIRED: Replace all placeholder values below before starting the pool.
_wallet_note: wallet_address MUST be set to YOUR wallet address for the selected coin. Mining rewards will be sent to this address.
_devices_note: Add your mining devices here. Each device needs a 'name' and 'ip'. Supported types: axeos, nmaxe, nerdqaxe, qaxe, qaxeplus, luckyminer, jingleminer, zyber, esp32miner, avalon, antminer, antminer_scrypt, whatsminer, innosilicon, goldshell, hammer, futurebit, canaan, ebang, gekkoscience, ipollo, epic, elphapex, braiins, vnish, luxos

_devices_example._note: Copy the structure below into 'devices' and replace with your miner's name and IP address. Port 4028 is the Antminer API default.
